name: Tiger Butter
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine white chocolate and peanut butter in the top of a double boiler.
2. Bring water to a boil.
3. Reduce heat to low and cook until chocolate and peanut butter melt, stirring constantly.
4. Spread mixture onto a waxed paper-lined 15x10x1-inch jellyroll pan.
5. Pour semi-sweet chocolate over peanut butter mixture and swirl through with a knife.
6. Chill until firm.
7. Cut into 1-1/2 x 1-inch pieces.
8. Store in refrigerator. Yields about 6 dozen pieces.
